jei.advancedjobs.job_npc_wand.1: Marks service NPCs without dedicated spawn eggs.
jei.advancedjobs.job_npc_wand.2: Normal: Jobs NPC | Sneak: Contracts | Off hand: Daily | Off hand + Sneak: Salary
jei.advancedjobs.job_npc_wand.3: Sprint: Skills | Sprint + Sneak: Leaderboard | Off hand + Sprint: Help | Off hand + Sprint + Sneak: Status
jei.advancedjobs.jobs_master: Opens the main jobs flow. Main hand focuses primary, off hand targets the secondary slot, and sneak-use opens My Job.
jei.advancedjobs.daily_board: Opens the Daily tab for the targeted profession slot. Sneak-use jumps to My Job.
jei.advancedjobs.status_board: Opens the My Job tab for the targeted profession slot. Sneak-use returns to the main jobs browser for that profession.
jei.advancedjobs.contracts_board: Opens the Contracts tab. Sneak-use rerolls the targeted contract slot with the configured price and cooldown.
jei.advancedjobs.salary_board: Opens the Salary tab for the targeted slot. Sneak-use attempts an immediate salary claim.
jei.advancedjobs.skills_board: Opens the Skills tab for the targeted slot. Sneak-use jumps to My Job.
jei.advancedjobs.leaderboard_board: Opens the Top tab for the targeted slot. Sneak-use jumps to My Job.
jei.advancedjobs.help_board: Opens the Help tab for the targeted slot. Sneak-use returns to the main jobs browser for that profession.

job.advancedjobs.miner.desc: Earn salary for mining ores and deep resources.
job.advancedjobs.deep_miner.desc: Focus on deep slate ores and dangerous underground mining.
job.advancedjobs.quarry_worker.desc: Break stone and industrial building materials for income.
job.advancedjobs.lumberjack.desc: Cut logs and manage forests for profit.
job.advancedjobs.forester.desc: Plant, restore and harvest forest resources.
job.advancedjobs.digger.desc: Move dirt, gravel and loose terrain materials.
job.advancedjobs.sand_collector.desc: Collect sand and red sand for builders and industry.
job.advancedjobs.ice_harvester.desc: Harvest ice in frozen regions for premium payment.
job.advancedjobs.farmer.desc: Harvest crops and keep fields productive.
job.advancedjobs.animal_breeder.desc: Raise and breed farm animals for profit.
job.advancedjobs.fisher.desc: Get paid for fish and valuable catches.
job.advancedjobs.beekeeper.desc: Work with bees, honey and hive products.
job.advancedjobs.herbalist.desc: Gather herbs, berries and alchemical plants.
job.advancedjobs.shepherd.desc: Care for sheep and wool production.
job.advancedjobs.hunter.desc: Hunt hostile mobs and survive dangerous areas.
job.advancedjobs.monster_slayer.desc: Target stronger monsters for increased rewards.
job.advancedjobs.guard.desc: Protect settlements and fight organized threats.
job.advancedjobs.bounty_hunter.desc: Track valuable hostile targets and elite enemies.
job.advancedjobs.defender.desc: Hold the line and eliminate nearby threats.
job.advancedjobs.boss_hunter.desc: Take contracts for the deadliest bosses.
job.advancedjobs.builder.desc: Build structures and place valuable blocks.
job.advancedjobs.mason.desc: Specialist in stone, brick and refined construction blocks.
job.advancedjobs.carpenter.desc: Work with wood, furniture-style blocks and storage pieces.
job.advancedjobs.merchant.desc: Trade with villagers and profit from deals.
job.advancedjobs.alchemist.desc: Brew potions and work with rare ingredients.
job.advancedjobs.enchanter.desc: Enchant gear and books for magical income.
job.advancedjobs.explorer.desc: Discover chunks and loot hidden treasure.
job.advancedjobs.blacksmith.desc: Smelt metals and forge useful tools.
job.advancedjobs.armorer.desc: Craft armor and improve defensive equipment.
job.advancedjobs.cook.desc: Prepare food and process ingredients efficiently.
job.advancedjobs.engineer.desc: Work with redstone and technical blocks.
job.advancedjobs.treasure_hunter.desc: Find loot, relics and rare rewards.
job.advancedjobs.redstone_technician.des: Maintain redstone systems and automation components.
job.advancedjobs.archaeologist.desc: Recover relics and ancient finds from suspicious blocks.

gui.advancedjobs.help.1: 1. Open Jobs and pick a primary profession.
gui.advancedjobs.help.2: 2. Use My Job or Info to see salary, resets, and your next unlock.
gui.advancedjobs.help.3: 3. Follow Guide or Where Ready to find the nearest actionable board.
gui.advancedjobs.help.4: 4. Spend skill points every 5 levels in the Skills tab.
gui.advancedjobs.help.5: 5. Complete dailies and contracts for stronger bonus payouts.
gui.advancedjobs.help.onboarding: Next step: choose your first profession in Jobs, then reopen Help or My Job for slot-specific guidance.
gui.advancedjobs.help.where_next: Where next: head to %s for the %s flow.
gui.advancedjobs.help.where_next.onboard: Where next: start with %s for your %s flow.
gui.advancedjobs.help.secondary_commands: Secondary slot commands work across info, stats, skills, daily, contracts and milestones.
command.advancedjobs.info.onboarding: - No profession is assigned yet. Start with /jobs to browse professions or use /jobs choose <job> when you already know your target.
command.advancedjobs.info.primary_detail: * Primary slot | Lvl %s | Pending $%s | Earned $%s | Next claim $%s
command.advancedjobs.info.secondary_deta: * Secondary slot | Lvl %s | Pending $%s | Earned $%s | Next claim $%s
command.advancedjobs.info.title: - Title: %s
command.advancedjobs.help.first_run.1: 1. Run /jobs and browse professions or use a marked Jobs NPC.
command.advancedjobs.help.first_run.2: 2. Pick a primary profession, then run /jobs info to see salary, resets, and your next unlock.
command.advancedjobs.help.first_run.3: 3. Use /jobs guide or /jobs where ready to find the nearest board that is actionable right now.
command.advancedjobs.help.navigate: /jobs navigate [radius] - print the shortest next-step route for the current slot, with why/source/follow-up.
command.advancedjobs.help.navigate_all: /jobs navigate all [radius] - print the compact next-step route summary for both profession slots.
command.advancedjobs.help.navigate_secon: /jobs navigate secondary [radius] - print the compact next-step route for the second profession slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.guide: /jobs guide [radius] - recommend the next service board to visit, with nearby source and follow-up.
command.advancedjobs.help.guide_all: /jobs guide all [radius] - print the recommended route summary for both profession slots.
command.advancedjobs.help.guide_secondar: /jobs guide secondary [radius] - recommend the next desk for the second profession slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.where: /jobs where [radius] - show nearby service boards and how far they are.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_ready: /jobs where ready [radius] - show only the desks that are actionable right now, with why/source.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_ready_al: /jobs where ready all [radius] - show actionable desk coverage for both profession slots.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_ready_se: /jobs where ready secondary [radius] - show actionable desks for the second profession slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_native: /jobs where native [radius] - show only native service boards nearby.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_wand: /jobs where wand [radius] - show only wand-tagged fallback boards nearby.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_role: /jobs where <role> [radius] - find one specific nearby service board role.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_summary: /jobs where summary [radius|secondary|all] - show nearby hub coverage plus next desk, why, and follow-up.
command.advancedjobs.help.where_missing: /jobs where missing [radius] - show which service boards are missing nearby.
command.advancedjobs.help.secondary: /jobs choose <job> secondary - set your secondary profession.
command.advancedjobs.help.secondary_supp: /jobs ... secondary - inspect the second slot in supported commands.
command.advancedjobs.help.progress: /jobs info [secondary] and /jobs stats [secondary] - view profession progress and history.
command.advancedjobs.help.salary: /jobs salary - claim pending salary from assigned professions.
command.advancedjobs.help.salary_board_q: Salary Board: main hand opens primary salary view, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use attempts an immediate claim.
command.advancedjobs.help.mob_filters: Mob reward filters: artificial=%s | baby=%s | tamed=%s.
command.advancedjobs.help.loot_chunk_fil: Loot/exploration anti-abuse: container cooldown=%s | explored chunk cooldown=%s.
command.advancedjobs.help.daily: /jobs daily [secondary] - list current daily tasks for a slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.daily_board_qu: Daily Board: main hand opens primary dailies, off hand opens the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.status_board_q: Status Board: main hand opens primary My Job, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use returns to the jobs browser for that profession.
command.advancedjobs.help.contracts: /jobs contracts [secondary] - list active contracts and timers for a slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.contract_board: Use Contracts Board with main hand for primary contracts, or off hand for the secondary slot. Sneak-use rerolls that slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.jobs_master_qu: Jobs Master: main hand focuses primary, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
command.advancedjobs.help.help_board_qui: Help Board: main hand opens primary help, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use returns to the jobs browser for that profession.
command.advancedjobs.help.skills_board_q: Skills Board: main hand opens the primary skill tree, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.

command.advancedjobs.help.leaderboard_bo: Leaderboard Board: main hand opens the primary ranking, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.

command.advancedjobs.admin.help.health: /jobsadmin health - quick health summary for online state, economy routing, caches, and anti-abuse runtime
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.perfchec: /jobsadmin perfcheck - compact performance-readiness check for caches, flags, and runtime trackers
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.economyc: /jobsadmin economycheck - focused economy routing, bridge, currency, and tax-sink diagnostics
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.readyche: /jobsadmin readycheck - compact release-readiness check before smoke-pass or visual verification
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.status: /jobsadmin status - detailed economy, event, anti-abuse, cache, and reward-index summary

command.advancedjobs.admin.help.doctor: /jobsadmin doctor [radius] - find missing/duplicate hub roles and broken npc config
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.doctorfi: /jobsadmin doctorfix [radius] - respawn missing roles and reset broken skins/empty labels

command.advancedjobs.admin.help.migraten: /jobsadmin migratenative [radius] - convert wand-tagged fallback NPCs into native board entities
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.alignhub: /jobsadmin alignhub [radius] - move one NPC per role into the canonical hub layout around you
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.replacer: /jobsadmin replacerole <role> [radius] - replace the nearest NPC for one role with a fresh native board entity
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.inspectr: /jobsadmin inspectrole <role> [radius] - inspect the nearest NPC for one role
command.advancedjobs.admin.help.inspecti: /jobsadmin inspectissues [radius] - print only roles that currently look broken or inconsistent

command.advancedjobs.admin.perfcheck.sum: Ready | current runtime looks safe for the practical performance pass.
Warning | resolve the items below before trusting the current stack for performance validation.
command.advancedjobs.admin.perfcheck.adv: Advice | warm caches before checking `/jobs` responsiveness, hub interaction, or leaderboard opens.
Advice | reward index looks cold. Fix config loading and rerun /jobsadmin reload before perf testing.
Advice | NPC skin caches are empty. This is fine for default skins, but visual QA may look incomplete until caches are warmed or local files are verified.
Advice | stop reward events and disable debug logging before trying to judge runtime performance.
Advice | anti-abuse trackers are already populated. If you want a cleaner perf baseline, retest after a calmer runtime window or server restart.
Ready | economy routing looks good for external-mode verification.
Warning | fix the economy issues below before external-provider QA or release.
Advice | configured external provider is not active. Check Z_Economy presence and rerun /jobsadmin reload.
Advice | Z_Economy bridge is unavailable. Install or load the dependency before testing external salary routing.
Advice | externalCurrency is blank. Set a valid currency id in config/ZAdvancedJobs/economy.json.
Advice | taxSinkAccountUuid is invalid. Fix economy.json before testing taxes or production payouts.
command.advancedjobs.admin.payoutcheck.s: Summary | mode=%s | pending=%s | gross preview=%s | net preview=%s
command.advancedjobs.admin.payoutcheck.r: Rules | tax=%s%% | claim cap=%s | cooldown remaining=%s
command.advancedjobs.admin.payoutcheck.a: Advice | instant salary is enabled. Pending salary should normally stay near zero unless deposit fallback already happened.
Advice | player has no assigned job. Choose a profession before checking manual payout flow.
Advice | player has no pending salary right now. Earn salary first or verify instant-salary fallback cases.
Advice | salary claim is still on cooldown for %s.
Advice | current claim will be capped at %s and leave %s pending for a later claim.
Advice | player should be able to claim salary now if economy routing is healthy.
Summary | assigned jobs=%s | combined levels=%s | total earned=%s | pending salary=%s
Activity | active dailies=%s | active contracts=%s | salary cooldown=%s
Job | id=%s | level=%s | xp=%s | earned=%s | pending=%s | skill points=%s | dailies=%s | contracts=%s
Advice | no professions are assigned yet, so there is nothing meaningful to balance-check on this profile.
Advice | this profile still looks early-game. Focus on first salary timing, first contracts, and whether one job choice feels too dominant.
Advice | this profile looks mid-game. Compare whether salary, dailies, contracts, and perks are all still relevant.
Advice | this profile looks late-game. Watch for inflation, trivial rerolls, or one profession carrying the whole economy.
Advice | pending salary already exceeds the claim cap of %s. Current total is %s, so payout pacing may feel bursty.
Advice | no active contracts are present. Check whether reroll friction or contract value is discouraging use.
Advice | no active dailies are present. Check whether resets, pools, or player engagement are leaving the loop empty.
command.advancedjobs.admin.balanceovervi: Summary | profiled players=%s | avg levels=%s | avg earned=%s | total pending=%s
Activity | active dailies=%s | active contracts=%s | total earned=%s
Advice | there are no cached player profiles yet, so there is no server-side balance shape to review.
Advice | the server still looks early-game on average. Check whether first rewards and first contracts feel strong enough.
Advice | the server looks mid-game on average. Compare whether salary, dailies, and contracts are all still worth doing.
Advice | the server looks late-game on average. Watch for inflation, trivial rerolls, and one dominant profession loop.
Advice | total pending salary is already high at %s against claim cap %s. Payout pacing may be storing too much value between claims.
Advice | there are no active contracts in cached profiles. Contract value or reroll friction may be too weak or too punishing.
Advice | there are no active dailies in cached profiles. Check whether resets, pools, or player engagement are leaving that loop empty.

command.advancedjobs.admin.balancejobs.a: Advice | there are no assigned professions in cached profiles yet, so profession balance cannot be reviewed.
Advice | %s already dominates %s%% of assigned profession slots. Compare its loop and payout curve against weaker jobs.
Advice | only one or two professions appear active in cached profiles. Review onboarding and relative rewards so more jobs stay viable.
Advice | %s carries average pending salary %s against claim cap %s. Its payout pacing may be stacking too much value.
Advice | %s currently has no active contracts in cached profiles. Contract value or reroll friction may be too weak for that profession.
Advice | %s currently has no active dailies in cached profiles. Check whether its task pool or engagement loop is too weak.

command.advancedjobs.admin.balancejob.ad: Advice | %s is not assigned in cached profiles yet, so there is no live balance signal to review.
Advice | %s only appears in %s%% of cached profiles. Check onboarding, first rewards, and whether another profession is crowding it out.
Advice | %s already appears in %s%% of cached profiles. Compare its loop and payout curve against other professions for dominance.
Advice | %s still looks early-game on average. Check whether its first rewards and first task loop feel worthwhile.
Advice | %s already looks late-game on average. Watch for inflation, trivial rerolls, or too much economy pressure from this profession.
Advice | %s carries average pending salary %s against claim cap %s. Its payout pacing may be storing too much value between claims.
Advice | %s currently has no active contracts in cached profiles. Contract value or reroll friction may be too weak here.
Advice | %s currently has no active dailies in cached profiles. Check whether its task pool or engagement loop is too weak.

Advice | %s is not assigned in cached profiles yet, so there is no live progression signal to review.
Advice | %s only appears in %s%% of cached profiles. Progression feedback may be too weak or onboarding may be pushing players elsewhere.
Advice | %s leaves too many free skill points on average at %s. Skill UI clarity or perk desirability may need attention.
Advice | %s shows very few unlocked nodes on average. Check whether the skill tree feels worth investing into.
Advice | %s reaches reasonable levels but still unlocks very few milestones. Milestone pacing may be too slow.
Advice | %s is already unlocking many milestones at a relatively low average level. Progression pacing may be too fast.

command.advancedjobs.admin.readycheck.su: Ready | runtime looks good for the staged verification flow.
Warning | fix the items below before treating this build as release-ready.
command.advancedjobs.admin.readycheck.ad: Advice | jobs or reward index are not ready. Review config validation output and rerun /jobsadmin reload.
Advice | configured external economy is not active. Verify Z_Economy and rerun /jobsadmin reload before economy QA.
Advice | warm runtime caches before opening the service client or measuring UI packet flow.
Advice | NPC skin caches are empty. This is fine for default online skins, but warm caches or verify local PNG files if custom visuals are expected.
Advice | stop active reward events and disable debug logging before final smoke-pass or release build verification.
command.advancedjobs.admin.readycheck.ne: Next step | follow docs/VERIFICATION_FLOW.md and capture the result with docs/RELEASE_VERIFICATION_REPORT.md.

Advice | reward index is empty or no jobs are loaded. Check config validation output and rerun /jobsadmin reload after fixing broken data.
Advice | NPC skin caches are empty. This is fine for default online skins, but warm caches or verify local skin files if custom skins should already be available.
command.advancedjobs.admin.doctorfix.sum: Doctor fix | radius=%s | spawned missing roles=%s | reset skin sources=%s | reset labels=%s
command.advancedjobs.admin.doctorfix.not: Doctor fix does not remove duplicate NPC roles; use hublist/clearhub if cleanup is needed.
Normalized jobs hub | radius=%s | removed duplicate NPCs=%s
Normalization keeps one NPC per role and prefers native board entities over wand-tagged fallback NPCs.

command.advancedjobs.admin.alignhub.note: Alignment repositions one NPC per role into the standard hub layout and prefers native board entities.

command.advancedjobs.help.event_status: Current reward event multiplier: x%s | time left: %s
gui.advancedjobs.help.mob_filters: Mob reward filters | artificial: %s | baby: %s | tamed: %s
gui.advancedjobs.help.loot_chunk_filters: Loot/chunk reward cooldowns | containers: %s | explored chunks: %s
gui.advancedjobs.help.restrictions.mobs: Why kills may not count: artificial, baby, or tamed mobs are filtered. Hunt natural adult mobs for reliable progress.
Kill rewards are currently relaxed. Natural mob kills should usually count normally.
gui.advancedjobs.help.restrictions.loot: Why loot/exploration may not count: reused containers need %s and explored chunks need %s before rewarding again.
gui.advancedjobs.help.daily_board_quick_: Daily Board: main hand opens primary dailies, off hand opens the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.status_board_quick: Status Board: main hand opens the primary My Job flow, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use returns to the jobs browser for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.salary_board_quick: Salary Board: main hand opens primary salary view, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use attempts an immediate claim.
gui.advancedjobs.help.contract_board_qui: Main hand targets the primary profession, off hand targets the secondary slot. Sneak-use rerolls the targeted contracts.
gui.advancedjobs.help.jobs_master_quick_: Jobs Master: main hand opens the primary profession flow, off hand targets the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.help_board_quick_a: Help Board: main hand opens the primary help flow, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use returns to the jobs browser for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.skills_board_quick: Skills Board: main hand opens the primary skill tree, off hand targets the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.leaderboard_board_: Leaderboard Board: main hand opens the primary profession ranking, off hand focuses the secondary slot. Sneak-use opens My Job for that slot.
gui.advancedjobs.help.wand_quick_action: Jobs NPC Wand: normal=Jobs NPC | sneak=Contracts | off hand=Daily | off hand+sneak=Salary | sprint=Skills | sprint+sneak=Top | off hand+sprint=Help | off hand+sprint+sneak=Status

command.advancedjobs.info.restrictions.m: - Why kills may fail: use naturally spawned, adult, untamed mobs for reliable reward credit.
- Kill rewards are currently relaxed; most natural mob kills should count normally.
command.advancedjobs.info.restrictions.l: - Why loot/exploration may fail: reused containers need %s and explored chunks need %s before rewarding again.

- Next step for combat progress: hunt natural, adult, untamed mobs so kills are not filtered out.
- Combat progress is currently relaxed; most natural mob kills should count normally.
- Next step for loot/exploration progress: use fresh containers and new chunks, or wait %s / %s for cooldown reset.
